title: PolyAPI Job
description: A job executes a function at a set time, interval, or CRON schedule for automated recurring tasks.

id.description: The unique identifier of the job.

functionId.description: The ID of the function to execute.

functionType.description: The type of function to execute.

schedule.description: The CRON expression or interval defining when the job runs.

nextRunAt.description: Timestamp of the next scheduled execution.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the job was last updated.
